user_prompt: My surgical servitor is ready for repair
prayer:
Approach the surgical servitor with mechadendrites extended in humble petition.

Anoint its lacerated flesh-vats and servo-arms with blessed unguents of ferro-fluid.
Chant the Canticle of Restoration whilst splicing neural cabling anew.
Verify the surgical servitor's renewed vigor through vivisection diagnostics.

Confirm the noospheric relay's harmony through noetic resonance scans.
